original text:
2 left! Hurry only two 10' by 35' Climate Controlled spaces left!
We at Life Storage want to maintain the best storage facilities in Elmhurst, and in every city where we do business.	That's why we routinely ask our customers about their experience with us and challenge ourselves to make it better. You can read what customers think about us here on our website - over the past four years, we've had over 100,000 customers respond to our surveys and tell us what they think. We publish their reviews here, and we're proud of the result!
"Staff was helpful and professional. Facility was well maintained. Will certainly use the facility again if ever there is a need."
"You exceeded my expectations. Jeff was amazing, he was kind courteous and extremely helpful and knowledgeable about the entire facility."
"The associates at my facility are the greatest. Jeff and Lupo couldn't be better."
"Luco was very polite, knowledgeable, helpful, friendly. The facility was well lit, clean, accessible."
"I use the location at 953 S. Rt 83 in Elmhurst, IL. Luco and Jeff are awesome. Friendly, knowledgeable, and know their customers. It's great to walk in and they know who you are. It's a well maintained, clean building. This location is very well run. This is an excellent location which I've recommended to others. As far as the company overall, the periodic changing of unit prices makes me shop your competition. "
"I love the friendly staff, the cleanliness and climate control units, the hours of access and the location. I wish there was a life storage in Clarksville, TN."
"I am exceptionally satisfied with my experience at LifeStorage. Regretfully, I am no longer in need of storage services. If I ever need services down the road, I will absolutely be back at Life Storage Elmhurst!"
"I HIGHLY RECOMMEND THIS FACILITY TO ANYONE LOOKING FOR STORAGE. ALWAYS TREATED RESPECTFULLY AND THE GUYS ARE ALWAYS HELPFUL AND COURTEOUS."
"The Gentlemen that work out of the Elmhurst location are very helpful and professional and have been very pleasant to work with. "
"Jeff and Luka are WONDERFUL they are so kind and helpful! I would never go anywhere else to meet my storage needs! The building is fresh and clean and the boys are always ready to lend a hand with my lock or if I have some questions! They are never without a SMILE! So nice to see them sitting at the desk each and every time I go into the office!! They are truly a assets to your company! Thank you !"
"I am very pleased with the helpfulness of the employees. Anytime I have questions, they are promptly answered. I was most touched regarding a recent issue I had of not being able to get something out of my storage unit, and the front desk associate took time to come and help me and even provided suggestions on how to move things around to make it easier for my next trip."
"Love the assess ability. I feel safe when I'm in the facility. Keep doing what your doing."
"I like the fact that the property is always kept neat!"
Our self storage facility on S. State Route 83 is located east of the Kingery Hwy, between W Van Buren St and Frontage Rd, near Eldridge Park. Click here for directions.
At Life Storage Facility #559, we offer great property security systems and clean, affordable storage units to rent for the residents of Hillside, Lombard, Oak Brook, and other neighborhoods in Elmhurst, IL. Call us with questions, reserve online, or click here to compare other storage units in Chicago.
